ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor that collected the data */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humid" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_spd" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "vis" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "press" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "weather_condition" INTEGER /* Weather condition (e.g., Mainly Clear, Mostly Cloudy) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data (e.g., valid, suspect, missing) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "sensor_count" INTEGER /* Number of sensors installed at the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather condition (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended calibration interval in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific sensor that collected the data */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value recorded by the sensor */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data (e.g., valid, suspect, missing) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather prediction */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_temp" REAL /* Predicted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_humid" INTEGER /* Predicted relative humidity in percentage */,
  "predicted_wind_spd" REAL /* Predicted wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "predicted_vis" REAL /* Predicted visibility in kilometers */,
  "predicted_press" REAL /* Predicted atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "predicted_weather_condition" INTEGER /* Predicted weather condition (e.g., Mainly Clear, Mostly Cloudy) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_source_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., High Temperature, Severe Wind) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert in minutes */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
